reservation.no_vehicles_desc: Try changing your dates or filters.

agency.title: Our Agency
agency.subtitle: Automotive excellence at your service from Marrakech. Personalized support for every journey.
agency.about_text_1: Bouderba Rental Cars is a vehicle rental agency based in Marrakech, in the heart of Morocco. Founded on values of trust, quality, and proximity, we provide you with a fleet of carefully maintained vehicles to meet all your travel needs.
agency.about_text_2: Whether for a business trip, family vacation, or a simple getaway, our team supports you with personalized and professional service. We believe that every customer deserves a smooth, transparent rental experience with no surprises.
agency.val_quality_desc: Recent and perfectly maintained vehicles for your comfort and safety.
agency.val_trust_desc: Total transparency on rates, no hidden fees, a clear contract.
agency.val_avail_desc: A responsive team, available 24/7 to assist you at any time.
agency.val_flex_desc: Delivery and pickup of the vehicle wherever you want in Marrakech.
agency.step_1_desc: Browse our catalog and select the vehicle that fits your needs and budget.
agency.step_2_desc: Fill out the booking form with your dates, locations, and details. It's fast and easy.
agency.step_3_desc: We deliver the vehicle to the agreed location or you come pick it up. Enjoy your ride!
agency.cta_desc: Book now and enjoy a premium rental service.

legal.title: Legal Information
legal.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our conditions, privacy, and legal notices.
legal.cond_1_desc: To rent a vehicle from Bouderba Rental Cars, the renter must:
legal.cond_1_li1: Be at least 21 years old on the date of vehicle pickup.
legal.cond_1_li2: Hold a valid driver's license for at least 2 years.
legal.cond_1_li3: Present a valid national ID card or passport.
legal.cond_1_li4: Have a valid payment method accepted by our agency.
legal.cond_2_desc1: All bookings are subject to the availability of the chosen vehicle. The booking is confirmed upon receipt of your request. Payment is made directly at the agency upon handover of the keys. We accept cash and bank transfers.
legal.cond_2_desc2: In case of cancellation, please notify us at least 24 hours before pickup to avoid any penalty.
legal.cond_3_desc: The rented vehicle can only be driven by the primary renter named in the contract. Subletting is strictly prohibited. The vehicle must be returned in the state it was provided, clean and with the same fuel level.
legal.cond_3_li1: Personal use only — no commercial transport.
legal.cond_3_li2: Compliance with current Moroccan traffic laws.
legal.cond_3_li3: Any damage occurred during the rental period is the renter's responsibility unless otherwise agreed.
legal.cond_4_desc: All our vehicles are insured in accordance with Moroccan regulations. A deductible may apply in the event of an accident. Bouderba Rental Cars disclaims any responsibility for personal belongings left in the vehicle.
legal.cond_5_desc: The vehicle must be returned at the date, time, and location agreed upon in the contract. Any unnotified delay may be charged. A joint inspection will be carried out upon return.
legal.priv_1_desc: As part of our services, we collect the following information:
legal.priv_1_li1: Identification info: first name, last name, ID or passport number.
legal.priv_1_li2: Contact info: email address, phone number.
legal.priv_1_li3: Booking info: dates, pickup and return locations, chosen vehicle.
legal.priv_2_desc: The collected data is used exclusively to:
legal.priv_2_li1: Process and confirm your booking requests.
legal.priv_2_li4: Comply with our legal and contractual obligations.
legal.priv_2_desc2: We do not sell, rent, or share your personal data with third parties for commercial purposes.
legal.priv_3_desc: Your data is kept for a period of 5 years from the end of your rental agreement, in compliance with our legal obligations.
legal.priv_4_desc: In accordance with Law No. 09-08 on the protection of individuals with regard to the processing of personal data, you have the following rights:
legal.priv_4_li1: Right of access: obtain a copy of your data.
legal.priv_4_li2: Right of rectification: correct inaccurate data.
legal.priv_4_li3: Right to erasure: request the deletion of your data.
legal.priv_4_li4: Right to object: object to the processing of your data.
legal.priv_4_desc2: To exercise these rights, contact us at the address indicated in the Legal Notices section.
legal.priv_5_desc: Our site uses technical cookies necessary for its proper functioning. No tracking or advertising cookies are used without your explicit consent.
legal.ment_2_desc: This site is hosted by a third-party provider. For any information related to hosting, please contact us directly.
legal.ment_3_desc: All content on this site (text, images, logos, graphics) is the exclusive property of Bouderba Rental Cars. Any reproduction, even partial, is prohibited without prior written permission.
legal.ment_4_desc: Bouderba Rental Cars strives to keep the information on this site up-to-date and accurate. However, we cannot be held responsible for errors or omissions, nor the consequences of their use.
legal.ment_5_desc: This site and these legal notices are subject to Moroccan law. Any dispute related to the use of the site will be submitted to the competent jurisdiction in Morocco.
